title: Ray's Added Spears (patched)
description: Adds the latest snapshot's spears with extended enchantment compatibility, including Looting and Mending combined!
body:
# Ray's Added Spears - Datapack

Enhance your Minecraft gameplay with the new spears (from Minecraft Snapshot 24w41a) that’s more versatile and powerful than ever. This datapack adds new enchantment options, crafting recipes, and combat mechanics for an engaging experience, for players who do not play on the snapshot versions, or just want it early in their gameplay!

## Features

- **Expanded Enchantments:** 
Compatible with **Mending** and **all levels of Lunging** for better speeds and or durability.  
- **Crafting Recipes:** 
Easy-to-follow recipes to integrate the spear into your survival or creative worlds.  
- **Unique Combat Mechanics:** 
Faster attacks, balanced knockback, and a more rewarding weapon for both PvE and PvP.  
- **Optional OP Tweaks:** 
For players who want an overpowered experience, the spear can be customized to have Mending and Lunging at the same time! 
- **Seamless Integration:** 
Works smoothly with vanilla Minecraft gameplay without breaking progression.

![Spear in the sunlight](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b0577b624f124276b25e2c68f0277919d2e558b2.png)

## Why Use This Pack?

Whether you’re farming, exploring, or battling mobs, this spear gives you flexibility, power, and fun mechanics while keeping the game balanced. Perfect for players who want **more control and excitement** in their adventures.
